_comment: MSFS proof-honesty baseline (schema v2). The native `verum audit --proof-honesty` classifier distinguishes structural vs tautological axiom-only @theorems. The CI gate re-runs the audit and refuses to merge any commit that REGRESSES below these counts.

totals_min._invariant: running totals must satisfy: total[k] >= totals_min[k] for monotone metrics, total[k] <= totals_max[k] for the trivial counters.
